contract.chart_assertions_forbidden: forecast, probability of reversal, causal mechanism, pooled effect.
contract.direct_artifact_mapping_rule: artifact + test_id/key + full SHA256 for every empirical claim.
contract.exact_values_and_units: Copy only mapped exact values; always name unit, horizon, frequency and scope.
contract.idempotence_rule: two canonical generator runs must be byte-identical.

locked_authority_per_child_report.E_STOCK_LEVEL_VOLUME_DIVERGENCE: R6 rebuild plus accepted R6 report remediation
